mapper.select: SELECT c.id, c.name, c.description, c.coach, c.max_capacity, IFNULL(r.reservation_count, 0) AS current_count, c.duration, c.location, c.schedule_time, c.status, c.create_time FROM course c LEFT JOIN ( SELECT course_id, COUNT(*) AS reservation_count FROM reservation WHERE status = 1 GROUP BY course_id ) r ON c.id = r.course_id ORDER BY c.create_time DESC

SELECT c.id, c.name, c.description, c.coach, c.max_capacity, IFNULL(r.reservation_count, 0) AS current_count, c.duration, c.location, c.schedule_time, c.status, c.create_time FROM course c LEFT JOIN ( SELECT course_id, COUNT(*) AS reservation_count FROM reservation WHERE status = 1 GROUP BY course_id ) r ON c.id = r.course_id ORDER BY c.create_time DESC LIMIT #{offset}, #{pageSize}

SELECT c.id, c.name, c.description, c.coach, c.max_capacity, IFNULL(r.reservation_count, 0) AS current_count, c.duration, c.location, c.schedule_time, c.status, c.create_time FROM course c LEFT JOIN ( SELECT course_id, COUNT(*) AS reservation_count FROM reservation WHERE status = 1 GROUP BY course_id ) r ON c.id = r.course_id WHERE c.status = 1 ORDER BY c.schedule_time ASC

SELECT c.id, c.name, c.description, c.coach, c.max_capacity, IFNULL(r.reservation_count, 0) AS current_count, c.duration, c.location, c.schedule_time, c.status, c.create_time FROM course c LEFT JOIN ( SELECT course_id, COUNT(*) AS reservation_count FROM reservation WHERE status = 1 GROUP BY course_id ) r ON c.id = r.course_id WHERE c.status = 1 ORDER BY c.schedule_time ASC LIMIT #{offset}, #{pageSize}

SELECT c.id, c.name, c.description, c.coach, c.max_capacity, IFNULL(r.reservation_count, 0) AS current_count, c.duration, c.location, c.schedule_time, c.status, c.create_time FROM course c LEFT JOIN ( SELECT course_id, COUNT(*) AS reservation_count FROM reservation WHERE status = 1 GROUP BY course_id ) r ON c.id = r.course_id WHERE c.id = #{id}

SELECT c.id, c.name, c.description, c.coach, c.max_capacity, IFNULL(r.reservation_count, 0) AS current_count, c.duration, c.location, c.schedule_time, c.status, c.create_time FROM course c LEFT JOIN ( SELECT course_id, COUNT(*) AS reservation_count FROM reservation WHERE status = 1 GROUP BY course_id ) r ON c.id = r.course_id
AND c.name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{name}, '%')
AND c.coach LIKE CONCAT('%', #{coach}, '%')
AND c.status = #{status}
ORDER BY c.create_time DESC

SELECT COUNT(*) FROM course c
AND c.name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{name}, '%')
AND c.coach LIKE CONCAT('%', #{coach}, '%')
AND c.status = #{status}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM reservation WHERE course_id = #{courseId} AND status = 1
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO course (name, description, coach, max_capacity, current_count, duration, location, schedule_time, status) VALUES (#{name}, #{description}, #{coach}, #{maxCapacity}, 0, #{duration}, #{location}, #{scheduleTime}, #{status})
mapper.update: UPDATE course SET status = #{status} WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM course WHERE status = #{status}
